Player.title: Player
Player.description: Represents a player in the poker game.

Dealer.title: Dealer
Dealer.description: Represents a dealer in the poker game.

GameRound.title: GameRound
GameRound.description: Represents a single round of the poker game.

id.description: Unique identifier for the game round.

startTime.description: The date and time when the round started.

endTime.description: The date and time when the round ended.

BuyIn.title: BuyIn
BuyIn.description: Represents a buy-in for a player in a specific game round.

buyInTime.description: The date and time of the buy-in.

Rebuy.title: Rebuy
Rebuy.description: Represents a re-buy for a player in a specific game round.

rebuyTime.description: The date and time of the re-buy.

dealerId.description: Reference to Dealer who approved/added the Rebuy. (Relationship: Dealer 1:N Rebuy)

definition.description: Stores player information. The 'playerId' is the same as the user's Firebase Auth UID.

params.name: playerId
params.description: The unique ID of the player, matching the Firebase Auth UID.

definition.description: Stores dealer information. The 'dealerId' is the same as the user's Firebase Auth UID.

params.name: dealerId
params.description: The unique ID of the dealer, matching the Firebase Auth UID.

definition.description: Stores buy-in information for each player.  The playerId parameter matches the player's Firebase Auth UID.

params.name: playerId
params.description: The unique ID of the player, matching the Firebase Auth UID.

params.name: buyInId
params.description: The unique ID of the buyin.

definition.description: Stores rebuy information for a given buyin of each player. Includes denormalized 'dealerId' for authorization independence.

params.name: playerId
params.description: The unique ID of the player, matching the Firebase Auth UID.

params.name: buyInId
params.description: The unique ID of the buyin.

params.name: rebuyId
params.description: The unique ID of the rebuy.

definition.description: Stores information about each game round.

params.name: gameRoundId
params.description: The unique ID of the game round.

firestore.reasoning: This design prioritizes authorization independence and secure list operations (QAPs) through denormalization and structural segregation. It uses dedicated collections for dealers and players. Buy-ins and Rebuys are stored as subcollections under each player, which helps to keep things neat and the DB rules easier to read and secure. The `players` collection stores the basic user info. `BuyIns` track each player's buy-ins for the current round. `Rebuys` track each player's rebuys, along with a dealer ID for authorization. Authorization Independence is achieved by storing the dealer's id on each rebuy, allowing to verify dealer roles without having to perform a `get()` request to the dealer document. All documents in each collection share the same security requirements, which enables secure `list` operations.
